barRaise.topFinding: The code is healthy; the process loop is leaking. This morning's autonomous audit-budget-nightly -> drift-auto-fix pass wrote two correct doc edits (DESIGN.md endpoint version tags v0.15.0 -> v0.12.0, and the real CHANGELOG.md v0.13.2 body replacing the -Bump stub), and both sit uncommitted in the working tree behind a stale .git/index.lock present since Jun 15. The CHANGELOG backfill flagged yesterday is the same uncommitted edit, now a day older, with a DESIGN.md edit joining it. The committed dashboard JSON is two audit cycles stale, and the YaB work-queue grew from 8 to 11 rows without draining the done/committed-ready ones. None of it is a code bug; all of it is the absence of an in-session step that commits what the audit-to-fix loop produces. Five MEDIUM, zero HIGH. The verdict holds at needs-attention for the second straight day, but the residue is now process drift rather than the security HIGH that defined the prior nine audits.
